case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. IZ & J CONSTRUCTION LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MICHAEL D. FRISCHER RE DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS (TRANSACTION ID # 74842140) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IZ & J CONSTRUCTION LLC $21,341.77 PRINCIPAL, $5,000.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,341.77, PER STIPULATION PG. 2 LINE 20-22, "ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE IMMEDIATELY DUE AND PAYABLE TOGETHER WITH REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES INCURRED IN COLLECTION OF THIS OBLIGATION.. " **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT**
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF CREDIT (TRANSACTION ID # 74842140) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74842140) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73813939) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT IZ & J CONSTRUCTION LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2025
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74842140) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT IZ & J CONSTRUCTION LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NO COPIES PROVIDED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT IZ & J CONSTRUCTION LLC

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,000.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($546.22 ON INTEREST, $453.78 ON PRINCIPAL), $335.17 INTEREST, $413.84 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 76843501) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 73813939) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76406675)
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT IZ & J CONSTRUCTION LLC
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 73813939) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74077314) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED AUG-08-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IZ & J CONSTRUCTION LLC
